title: Iran Threatens to Renew Strikes Against U.S. Amid Push for Diplomatic Deal
summary_full: The warnings came after U.S. forces struck military sites in Iran. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Tuesday that negotiations to end the war were continuing.
summary_public: The warnings came after U.S. forces struck military sites in Iran. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Tuesday that negotiations to end the war were continuing.
